Home.title: Heritage meets Innovation.
Home.desc: Sankofa International School delivers a deeply enriching, world-class curriculum in Hawassa, Ethiopia. We bridge the gap between profound cultural wisdom and cutting-edge global readiness, preparing students to lead with unyielding integrity.
ethosParagraphs: At Sankofa International School, we do not just prepare students for examinations; we prepare them for the complexities of the real world. Our philosophy is rooted in the belief that true excellence requires a balance of rigorous intellectual training and a profound ethical compass.
By integrating elite STEM facilities, world-class humanities, and deep respect for Ethiopian heritage, we craft well-rounded visionaries equipped to shape their communities and the world at large.
Home.qfDesc: A brief overview of our institutional metrics, curriculum frameworks, and global standards.

qfRows.detail: Ministry of Education, Pearson Edexcel, CIS Candidate

Home.program1Desc: Fostering boundless curiosity in a play-based, nurturing environment designed to build strong cognitive and social foundations.
Home.program2Desc: Building core academic competencies in literacy and numeracy alongside unbreakable ethical and cultural foundations.
Home.program3Desc: Rigorous university preparation featuring advanced STEM tracks, humanities, and elite global leadership programs.
Home.facDesc: Our campus in Hawassa is intentionally designed to support modern, inquiry-based learning. From advanced laboratories to expansive creative arts studios.
Home.bentoFeature1Desc: Integrating an unyielding code of ethics, inspired by Ethiopian roots, into every facet of our daily curriculum.
Home.bentoFeature2Desc: We ensure a balanced approach to education, nurturing emotional intelligence alongside academic prowess.
Home.bentoFeature3Desc: Our 15+ international partnerships ensure students receive a completely borderless education.
Home.lifeDesc: Education goes far beyond the four walls of a classroom. We offer a rich tapestry of extracurricular activities to ensure every student finds their passion, builds lifelong friendships, and develops crucial leadership skills.

lifeFeatures.title: Clubs & Societies
lifeFeatures.text: Over 20 student-led organizations including Debate, Model UN, and Environmental Action.

lifeFeatures.title: Creative Arts
lifeFeatures.text: Extensive programs in traditional Ethiopian arts, modern drama, and orchestral music.

lifeFeatures.title: Community Service
lifeFeatures.text: Mandatory service hours ensuring students give back to the Hawassa community meaningfully.

Home.step1Desc: Submit an online inquiry form and download our comprehensive 2026 academic prospectus.
Home.step2Desc: Schedule a guided tour of our Hawassa campus to experience our facilities firsthand.
Home.step3Desc: Students complete age-appropriate academic and behavioral assessments.
Home.step4Desc: Family interview with the Head of School, followed by final registration.
Home.ctaFinalDesc: Applications for the 2026/2027 academic year are currently open. Secure your child's place in East Africa's premier international learning community.

welcomeParagraphs: It is with great pride and deep appreciation that I extend a heartfelt welcome to all who visit our school — a vibrant and dynamic learning community that spans Early Years, Primary, and Secondary education.

At Sankofa International School, we are home to over 1,000 students, supported by a dedicated team of more than 135 educators and professionals, and a deeply involved parent community of approximately 1,400. Together, we form a close-knit family of curious learners, committed teachers, collaborative partners, and global citizens.

Our vision reaches beyond the borders of Ethiopia. As one of the nation’s leading private educational institutions, Sankofa International School attracts students and staff from across Ethiopia, the African continent, and around the world. We proudly deliver the National Curriculum for England — a curriculum renowned for its academic rigour and international relevance — guiding students from their earliest years through to A Levels.

At the heart of our mission is a commitment to developing the leaders of tomorrow — whether they aspire to be entrepreneurs, scientists, artists, diplomats, innovators, or changemakers. Our graduates leave Sankofa International School not only prepared for academic success but equipped with the character, confidence, and global perspective needed to thrive in a complex and evolving world.

To our current families, staff, and students: thank you for your trust and partnership. And to those considering joining our community — whether as a student, parent, or member of staff — we warmly invite you to explore what makes Sankofa International School a truly exceptional place to learn and grow.
We are proud of our achievements and excited for the possibilities ahead. I invite you to be a part of this remarkable journey.
About.diffIntro: At Sankofa International School, we are proud to stand apart — not only for the quality of our education but for the values that define us. Our unwavering commitment to Integrity, Leadership, Success, and Lifelong Learning forms the foundation of everything we do. These four pillars shape our culture, guide our decisions, and inspire our students to become confident, ethical, and impactful global citizens.
About.diff1Title: Integrity is at the heart of our school community.
About.diff1Desc: We believe in doing what is right — even when no one is watching. We foster a culture of honesty, transparency, and accountability, where students and staff are held to the highest ethical standards. By modelling strong moral character and principled decision-making, we instil in our students a lifelong commitment to integrity, both in school and beyond.
About.diff2Title: Leadership is embedded in our DNA.
About.diff2Desc: We believe every student has the potential to lead — in the classroom, in their communities, and in the world. Through structured leadership programmes, extracurricular activities, and service-learning initiatives, we nurture the skills, confidence, and character students need to take initiative, inspire others, and make a meaningful difference.
About.diff3Title: Success is more than academic achievement — it's a mindset.
About.diff3Desc: At Sankofa International School, we define success holistically: as the ability to set goals, overcome challenges, and grow into one’s full potential. Whether our graduates choose to pursue university, launch their own ventures, or explore new pathways, they leave us with the resilience, skills, and determination to thrive in all areas of life.
About.diff4Title: Lifelong Learning is the spirit that drives us.
About.diff4Desc: In an ever-evolving world, the ability to adapt and learn is essential. Our rigorous academic programmes, inquiry-based learning environments, and commitment to innovation encourage intellectual curiosity and creative thinking. We equip students not just to pass exams — but to remain curious, thoughtful learners for life.
About.diffOutro: At Sankofa International School, we don’t just prepare students for academic success. We prepare them for life — as principled leaders, forward-thinking innovators, and engaged global citizens. These are the values that set us apart — and the promise we make to every learner who walks through our doors.
About.visionDesc: To serve both the local and international community by delivering a high-quality, 21st-century learning experience that fosters academic excellence and ethical purpose. We aspire to equip Ethiopia’s next generation of entrepreneurs, inventors, innovators, scientists, engineers, and scholars — individuals prepared to lead with knowledge, creativity, and integrity in a rapidly changing world.
missionParagraphs: To be recognised as one of Ethiopia’s leading centres of educational excellence. Sankofa International School is a learning-focused institution offering world-class education that meets international standards, while proudly embracing and celebrating Ethiopian culture, values, and traditions.

We are committed to developing globally minded citizens who are equipped with the skills, character, and vision to thrive in the 21st century — and to contribute meaningfully to Ethiopia’s growth as a modern knowledge-based economy.
About.communityDesc: At Sankofa International School, we believe that the strength of a school lies in its people — the students who learn, the parents who support, and the educators who inspire. Together, we form a vibrant, purpose-driven community committed to excellence, integrity, and growth.
About.valStudentsTitle: Our Students: Inspired to Learn, Prepared to Lead
About.valStudentsIntro: Our students are the heart of everything we do. They are encouraged to explore, question, create, and grow in an environment that challenges them to reach their full potential — both academically and personally. Through our holistic and inquiry-based approach, we nurture young individuals who are:
valStudentsList: Learners – Passionate, curious, and driven by a desire to understand the world around them.
Ethical – Guided by strong moral values, respect for others, and a commitment to doing what is right.
Reflective – Able to evaluate their own progress, actions, and goals with maturity and thoughtfulness.
Resilient – Equipped to face challenges with courage, adaptability, and a growth mindset.
Confident – Articulate and self-assured, with the skills to express themselves and lead with purpose.
Collaborative – Effective team players who respect diversity and work well with others.
Challenged – Encouraged to stretch their thinking, innovate boldly, and strive for excellence every day.
About.valParentsTitle: Our Parents: Engaged Partners in Education
About.valParentsIntro: We believe education is most powerful when schools and families work in close partnership. At Sankofa International School, parents are not just supporters — they are collaborators in their child’s journey. We work hard to ensure that our parents are:
valParentsList: Valued – Their insights, concerns, and feedback are welcomed and respected.
Well-informed – Regularly updated on their child’s learning and school events through open communication.
Proud – Confident in the quality of education their children receive and the values we uphold.
Happy – Reassured by a safe, caring environment where their children are known and supported.
Welcomed – Actively included in the life of the school through events, meetings, and community initiatives.
Partners – Engaged in a shared commitment to nurturing the academic and personal growth of every learner.
About.valTeachersTitle: Our Teachers: Inspiring, Empowering, and Leading with Purpose
About.valTeachersIntro: Our educators are more than subject experts — they are mentors, role models, and lifelong learners. We are proud to have a team of professionals who are deeply committed to the academic and personal development of each student. Our teachers are:
valTeachersList: Values-Driven – Guided by integrity, empathy, and a passion for student success.
Honest – Transparent and ethical in all relationships and decisions.
Dynamic – Energetic and enthusiastic, with a passion for teaching and learning.
Innovative – Embracing new ideas, technologies, and methodologies to enhance learning.
Progressive – Continuously developing their practice to meet the needs of 21st-century learners.
Caring – Building trusting relationships and providing pastoral support that fosters wellbeing.
Ambitious – Setting high expectations for themselves and their students, and striving for excellence in all they do.
About.valuesOutro: At Sankofa International School, we are united by a shared mission: to nurture globally minded, ethical, and empowered individuals. Our students, parents, and teachers each play a vital role in shaping a school community where learning flourishes and futures are built with purpose.
promiseParagraphs: At Sankofa International School, we recognise that when you entrust us with your child, you are placing in our care what matters most to you. We hold that trust with the utmost respect and take our responsibility with deep seriousness and pride.
Our promise is simple, yet profound: to provide every child who walks through our doors with a safe, supportive, and inclusive environment where they are inspired to learn, grow, and thrive.

We are committed to delivering a world-class education that challenges and engages students through a curriculum that builds critical thinking, creativity, collaboration, and communication — the essential skills for success in the 21st century. Our passionate and highly qualified educators are dedicated not only to their subject areas, but to the success and wellbeing of each individual student in their care.

At Sankofa International School, we celebrate the uniqueness of every learner. We understand that each child has their own strengths, interests, and learning styles, and we tailor our approach to ensure they are empowered to reach their full potential. We embrace diversity and foster a culture of respect, inclusion, and belonging — where every student feels seen, heard, and valued.

We believe education is a partnership between school and home. We work closely with parents to understand their child’s goals, needs, and progress, maintaining open, honest communication every step of the way. Together, we shape a learning experience that supports not only academic achievement, but the social, emotional, and physical wellbeing of each child.

Beyond the classroom, our students benefit from a wide range of extracurricular opportunities — including sports, arts, leadership programmes, and community engagement — all designed to nurture well-rounded, confident individuals.

Above all, we are committed to creating a nurturing environment where every child feels supported, challenged, and empowered to succeed. Education is a lifelong journey, and our role is to prepare students to walk that path with integrity, compassion, and purpose — as capable, responsible, and globally minded citizens.
We welcome your partnership, value your input, and look forward to working together to give your child the very best start in life.
About.govRoleTitle: The Role of the Board of Trustees
govRoleDesc: At Sankofa International School, we are guided by a dedicated Board of Trustees that holds overall responsibility for the school’s strategic direction, long-term sustainability, and overall success. While the day-to-day management of the school is entrusted to the Principal and leadership team, the Board sets the vision and educational philosophy that shapes the future of Sankofa International School.

Comprised of local and international experts in education, business, and community leadership, the Board of Trustees ensures that the academic, financial, and operational performance of the school reflects the highest standards of excellence.
About.govRespTitle: Key Responsibilities of the Board of Trustees
govRespList: Vision and Strategy: The Board defines and maintains the long-term vision, mission, and values of Sankofa International School, ensuring the school remains aligned with its goals and aspirations.
Educational Oversight: It holds the school accountable for delivering exceptional education, supporting both academic performance and student wellbeing.
Financial Stewardship: The Board approves the school’s budget and oversees its responsible management by the Principal and senior leadership.
Community Engagement: Trustees play an active role in promoting Sankofa International School’s values and reputation within the local and international community.
Sustainability and Growth: The Board safeguards the future of the school, balancing ambition with responsible planning and governance.

Monitoring and Accountability: Trustees meet twice per term to receive detailed reports from the Principal, review progress against the school development plan, and engage in informed, constructive dialogue to guide future initiatives.
About.govVisDesc: Board members are encouraged to build a strong connection with the school by attending events, participating in visits, and meeting with staff and students. This hands-on approach strengthens oversight and ensures decisions are made with insight and context.
About.govExpect1: The Board expects the school to:
govExpect1List: Understand and respect the governance structure and the role of the Board.
Share in the collective commitment to educational excellence for all students.
Recognise and value the diverse skills, experiences, and perspectives of Board members.
Communicate clearly and openly, providing concise, relevant information to support decision-making.
Contribute to the induction, training, and development of trustees.
Minimise the use of technical jargon where possible, or explain it clearly when necessary.
About.govExpect2: The School Owner expects individual trustees to:
govExpect2List: Add meaningful value to the governance and direction of the school.
Offer constructive challenge in meetings while maintaining professionalism and discretion in public.
Come to meetings prepared and informed, having reviewed all materials in advance.
Attend meetings regularly and engage actively.
Champion the school within the community and among parents.
Respect the collective role of the Board and uphold confidentiality at all times.
Commit to ongoing personal development and training as trustees.
About.govExpect3: The School expects that the Board of Trustees will:
govExpect3List: Respect the professional expertise and judgment of the Principal and staff.
Collaborate in a spirit of partnership to advance the school’s mission and support students’ best interests.
Demonstrate commitment and integrity, both individually and as a collective.
Make decisions that serve the needs of the entire school community, free from personal or group agendas.
Promote the school positively among parents, the wider community, and stakeholders.
Support continuous learning through trustee induction and ongoing development opportunities.
About.govSharedDesc: The partnership between the Board of Trustees and the school leadership is built on trust, transparency, and a shared belief in the transformative power of education. Together, we are committed to sustaining Sankofa International School as a beacon of excellence — empowering students to succeed and lead in Ethiopia, across Africa, and around the world.
About.accExcellenceDesc: At Sankofa International School, we are committed to delivering a world-class education grounded in globally recognised standards. Accreditation plays a vital role in our pursuit of academic excellence, ensuring our students receive an education that meets international benchmarks and prepares them for future success — wherever their journey may lead.
About.accLicensedDesc: Sankofa International School is fully licensed by Ethiopia’s Ministry of Education to operate as a British curriculum international school. Like many of the leading international schools around the world, Sankofa International School follows the National Curriculum for England — widely celebrated for its academic rigour, broad subject coverage, and balanced approach to student development.
About.accLicensedDesc2: Our academic journey begins with children as young as age 3, who follow the UK Early Years Foundation Stage (EYFS). This well-structured framework nurtures essential early learning and development, forming the foundation for lifelong learning. Our early years are referred to as FS1 and FS2, in keeping with the UK system.
About.accLicensedDesc3: From the age of 5, students transition into the National Curriculum for England, where they are guided through a progression of learning outcomes tailored to their age and stage. Our teachers plan lessons aligned with these outcomes to ensure each child achieves — and often exceeds — age-related expectations.
About.accPearsonDesc1: Sankofa International School is proud to be fully accredited by Pearson Edexcel, one of the UK’s most prestigious and trusted examination boards. In the UK, accreditation is a rigorous and highly regulated process — Pearson is one of only five organisations authorised by the British government to offer GCSEs and A Levels within UK and international schools.
About.accPearsonDesc2: Pearson Edexcel is a global leader in education, and its qualifications are recognised by top universities and employers worldwide. Their programmes are especially supportive of international students and learners for whom English is a second language, offering clear, flexible assessment approaches that ensure every student has the opportunity to succeed.
About.accWhyDesc1: International British curriculum schools are typically accredited by either Pearson or Cambridge International, both of which are globally respected. At Sankofa International School, we have chosen Pearson Edexcel as our accreditation partner because we believe it offers the best balance of academic challenge, flexibility, and learner support.
About.accWhyDesc2: Pearson’s iGCSE (International GCSE) courses are renowned for nurturing critical thinking, subject mastery, and practical application. These qualifications go beyond rote memorisation — students develop skills in problem solving, independent inquiry, collaboration, and effective communication.
About.accPathwayDesc1: Students at Sankofa International School begin preparing for their iGCSE qualifications in Year 10, with formal examinations taking place at the end of Year 11. From there, they advance to A Level studies, a two-year programme culminating in internationally recognised qualifications by the time they graduate at age 18.
About.accPathwayDesc2: These qualifications are highly regarded by leading universities and institutions across the globe. With a Sankofa International School education backed by Pearson Edexcel accreditation, our graduates are equipped not only with outstanding academic credentials, but also with the confidence, skills, and global outlook needed to thrive in an ever-changing world.

overviewText: At Sankofa International School, we deliver a world-class British curriculum designed to inspire academic excellence, creativity, and global citizenship. Our broad and balanced program combines rigorous academics with rich extracurricular opportunities, ensuring students are well-prepared for a dynamic and interconnected world.

We emphasise independent thinking, creativity, and problem-solving—skills essential for success in the 21st century. Through a student-centred approach, learners are encouraged to explore their interests, develop their voice, and grow into confident, capable individuals.

Our internationally recognised qualifications open doors to top universities and career pathways around the world. With a diverse student body and inclusive culture, we promote cross-cultural understanding and global awareness.

Leadership development is a key pillar of our philosophy. We believe leadership is a mindset—fostered through initiative, collaboration, and responsibility. By empowering students to lead and innovate, we prepare them to shape and serve their communities with purpose and impact.
Sankofa International School is more than a school—it's a launchpad for future thinkers, creators, and leaders.
Academics.currIntro: Sankofa International School follows the internationally respected National Curriculum for England, providing students with a structured, progressive, and balanced educational experience from Early Years through to secondary school.
Academics.currStagesIntro: Our curriculum is divided into key stages:
Academics.currCore: Core subjects such as English, mathematics, and science are taught throughout, alongside a wide range of foundation subjects including history, geography, art, music, physical education, and modern foreign languages. Our teaching approach emphasises critical thinking, creativity, and real-world application.
Academics.currAssess: Assessment is ongoing and multifaceted, using a blend of teacher evaluation, coursework, and formal exams to track progress and tailor support to each student’s needs.
Academics.currPearson: Sankofa International School is proudly accredited by Pearson Edexcel, a leading UK awarding body. This ensures our programs meet rigorous international standards, and our students graduate with globally recognised qualifications that open doors to top universities and career opportunities worldwide.
Academics.currOutro: Our curriculum is more than just a framework—it's a launchpad for lifelong learning and future success.
Academics.foundIntro1: At Sankofa International School, our Foundation Stage (Nursery, FS1 & FS2) offers a warm, nurturing, and stimulating environment where young learners develop through play, exploration, and discovery.
Academics.foundIntro2: We follow the UK Early Years Foundation Stage (EYFS) framework, which focuses on seven key areas of learning and development:
Academics.foundAssess: Children are assessed continuously through observation, with progress shared regularly with parents. Our approach is child-centred and play-based, where teachers act as facilitators, encouraging curiosity, creativity, and independence.
Academics.foundOutro: We recognise that every child is unique. Our curriculum is designed to support the whole child—emotionally, socially, physically, and cognitively—laying a strong foundation for future academic success. Positive relationships, engaging activities, and a supportive environment ensure that our youngest learners thrive.
Academics.primIntro1: Sankofa International School follows the National Curriculum for England curriculum. This is a comprehensive curriculum framework that sets out the subjects, knowledge, skills, and understanding that children should be taught in primary schools. The primary ages phases of the National Curriculum for England cover children from the ages of 5 to 11, these correspond to Key Stages 1 and 2. The curriculum is divided into core and foundation subjects. The core subjects are English, mathematics, and science, while the foundation subjects are art and design, computing, design and technology, geography, history, languages, music, and physical education. At Sankofa International School our students study the subjects as prescribed by the National Curriculum for England. The languages studied by our students are English, French and either Amharic or Afan Oromo.
Academics.primIntro2: The primary phases at Sankofa International School are focused on delivering a curriculum that provides a well-rounded education that enables our students to develop their knowledge, skills, and understanding across a broad range of subjects. It is characterised by a balance between subject knowledge and skills, with a strong emphasis on English language development and numeracy.
Academics.primIntro3: At Sankofa International School we encourage our teachers to use a variety of teaching methods and approaches to engage children in their learning. These include group work, individual study, practical activities, and hands-on learning experiences. Teachers are also encouraged to use technology and digital resources to support teaching and learning. The philosophy of the Sankofa International School curriculum is based on the belief that education should be broad, balanced, and relevant to children’s lives. Our curriculum is designed to provide children with a solid foundation of knowledge, skills, and understanding, while also encouraging them to develop their creativity, curiosity, and critical thinking skills. At Sankofa International School we place a great emphasis on the use of technology in teaching and learning, as well as on the development of children’s social and emotional skills.
Academics.primIntro4: At Sankofa International School we are committed to promoting the values of Ethiopia, the rule of law, individual liberty, and mutual respect, tolerance, tolerance of different faiths and beliefs, and the importance of individual and community responsibility.
Academics.secIntro1: Sankofa International School provides a dynamic, future-focused secondary education based on the National Curriculum for England, supported by our prestigious Pearson Edexcel accreditation. We serve students aged 11 to 18, guiding them through Key Stages 3, 4, and 5, with a strong emphasis on academic excellence, personal development, and global readiness.
Academics.secIntro2: Our curriculum balances rigorous academic standards with opportunities for creativity, leadership, critical thinking, and innovation. Students graduate with internationally respected qualifications, well-prepared for top universities and successful careers around the world.
Academics.ks3Intro: Key Stage 3 lays a strong academic and personal foundation. The curriculum is broad and balanced, introducing students to a wide range of disciplines, including:
ks3List: Foundation Subjects: Geography, History, Art & Design, Music, ICT, Languages, and Physical Education
Academics.ks3Teaching: Teaching at this stage is focused on developing essential skills such as problem-solving, collaboration, communication, and independent learning. Lessons are designed to be interactive and engaging, incorporating technology, hands-on activities, and group work.
Academics.ks3Assess: Assessment is continuous and varied, using projects, practical assignments, and teacher evaluations to track student progress and tailor support to individual learning needs.
Academics.ks4Intro: In Key Stage 4, students prepare for the International General Certificate of Secondary Education (IGCSE)—a globally recognised qualification that opens doors to higher education and professional pathways.
Academics.ks4CoreIntro: Students take a combination of core and elective subjects. Core subjects typically include:
Academics.ks4Options: In addition, students select optional subjects based on their interests and future goals. Options may include Business Studies, ICT, Art & Design, or a second language.
Academics.ks4Outro: The IGCSE curriculum develops both academic depth and practical skills, encouraging students to think independently, analyse critically, and apply their knowledge to real-world challenges.
Academics.ks5Intro: Key Stage 5 focuses on academic specialisation and preparation for university and beyond. Students study Pearson Edexcel A Levels, one of the most respected post-16 qualifications in the world.
Academics.ks5Choose: Students usually choose three to four A Level subjects, allowing them to focus deeply on areas aligned with their career or higher education aspirations. Subjects offered may include:
Academics.ks5Lessons: A Level courses are intellectually challenging and encourage independent thought, research skills, and academic maturity. Lessons emphasise active learning, debate, exploration of complex topics, and real-world application.
Academics.ks5Assess: Students are assessed through a combination of examinations and coursework, ensuring they have multiple ways to demonstrate their knowledge and skills.
Academics.secApproachIntro: At Sankofa International School, our secondary school is designed to do more than deliver academic knowledge—we develop well-rounded, forward-thinking individuals. We:
secApproachList: Equip students with the skills and confidence to thrive in a globalised world
Foster a love of learning and a sense of curiosity
Provide leadership opportunities through student councils, clubs, and service projects
Cultivate respect for diversity, integrity, and social responsibility
Academics.secApproachOutro: Our graduates are confident, articulate, and prepared for the demands of higher education and professional life. Whether pursuing university in Ethiopia or abroad, our students leave us ready to shape the future.
resText: At Sankofa International School, we take a modern, student-centred approach to learning resources that supports creativity, curiosity, and critical thinking. In the Primary School, we make limited use of traditional textbooks, instead focusing on hands-on learning, interactive activities, and digital tools that bring lessons to life and encourage exploration.

In the Secondary School, some textbooks are used alongside a wide range of supplementary resources, including multimedia content, real-world case studies, and collaborative projects. This balanced approach ensures that students are not only gaining essential subject knowledge but also developing the skills they need to apply what they learn in meaningful and practical ways.
All learning materials are carefully aligned with the National Curriculum for England and Pearson Edexcel standards, ensuring academic rigour and global relevance.
commIntro: At Sankofa International School, we are more than just a school—we are a vibrant, inclusive community built on shared values, mutual respect, and a collective commitment to excellence. We believe that a strong sense of belonging is essential for both personal and academic success, and we work purposefully to create an environment where every voice is valued, every individual is supported, and every member is empowered to thrive.

Our community is defined by its diversity, its spirit of collaboration, and its focus on relationships. We celebrate differences in culture, background, and perspective, knowing that these enrich our learning environment and deepen our understanding of the world. Whether student, teacher, parent, or alumni—each person contributes to the character and strength of our school.
Academics.commCultureTitle: A Culture of Connection and Belonging
Academics.commCultureDesc: We foster a culture where empathy, kindness, and open communication guide our interactions. Strong relationships between students, families, and staff create a nurturing atmosphere where learners feel safe, respected, and inspired. We believe every student deserves to feel seen and heard, and we are committed to ensuring that each child experiences a true sense of belonging.
Academics.commCitizenDesc1: Community engagement is woven into the fabric of life at Sankofa International School. Through service projects, fundraising initiatives, and partnerships with local organisations, our students learn the value of giving back. They develop empathy, leadership skills, and a sense of purpose that extends far beyond the classroom.
Academics.commCitizenDesc2: We view community service not only as an opportunity to support others, but as a vital aspect of character education. By working together to address real-world challenges, our students gain an understanding of social responsibility and the power of collective action.
Academics.commPartnerDesc: We recognise the importance of building strong, meaningful partnerships with local businesses, NGOs, families, and alumni. These relationships enrich our school’s offerings and allow us to contribute positively to the wider community. We listen closely to the needs of those around us and remain committed to creating initiatives that bring mutual benefit and lasting impact.
Academics.commLegacyDesc1: At Sankofa International School, community is not just something we talk about—it is something we live every day. It is reflected in our classrooms, in our assemblies, in the friendships formed and the initiatives launched. We are proud of the inclusive, supportive, and forward-thinking community we are building, and we invite all who share our values to be a part of it.
Academics.commLegacyDesc2: Together, we are preparing the next generation of empathetic leaders, responsible citizens, and global changemakers—and that journey begins with community.
sportIntro: At Sankofa International School, sport is an essential part of our educational philosophy. We recognise that physical activity plays a vital role in a child’s overall development—supporting not only physical health, but also mental well-being, emotional resilience, and academic performance.

Our school offers a diverse and inclusive sports programme designed to inspire passion, participation, and performance. Students are encouraged to explore a wide range of activities, from competitive team sports such as football and basketball to individual pursuits like athletics and track and field. Every student has the opportunity to discover what they enjoy, build confidence in their abilities, and develop a lifelong appreciation for active living.
Academics.sportWellDesc: Regular physical activity contributes to improved fitness and overall health, reducing the risk of conditions such as obesity, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. But the benefits of sport extend far beyond the physical. Participation in sports has been shown to reduce stress, enhance mood, and support positive mental health—fostering balance, focus, and emotional stability in our students.
Academics.sportSkillsDesc: Sport is a powerful teacher of life skills. Through team sports, students learn the value of communication, collaboration, and leadership. In individual sports, they develop self-discipline, goal-setting, and the determination to persevere through challenges. These experiences help build character and confidence, equipping our students with skills that serve them both inside and outside the classroom.
Academics.sportAcadDesc: Research shows a strong link between physical activity and academic success. Students who engage in regular sports often demonstrate improved concentration, memory, and classroom performance. Sport also nurtures time management and encourages a structured, goal-orientated mindset—habits that enhance learning across all subjects.
sportCommitDesc: At Sankofa International School, we are committed to promoting a culture of active, healthy living. Our physical education curriculum is thoughtfully designed to be engaging, inclusive, and responsive to students’ needs and interests. We provide meaningful opportunities for students to challenge themselves, develop new skills, and experience the joy of movement—whether through casual participation or competitive sport.

We believe that sport enriches school life, strengthens our community, and helps every student grow into a confident, well-rounded individual. Through sport, we aim to inspire not only future athletes—but future leaders, team players, and changemakers.
Academics.extraIntro1: At Sankofa International School, education goes beyond the classroom. We believe that extra-curricular activities are a vital part of a well-rounded education, offering students opportunities to explore their interests, develop new skills, and grow into confident, capable individuals.
Academics.extraIntro2: Our rich programme of extra-curricular activities includes a wide variety of options such as sports teams, music and arts, debate and public speaking, STEM clubs, language enrichment, community service, and more. These experiences provide a platform for students to discover and pursue their passions—whether on the stage, in the lab, on the field, or within the community.
Academics.extraSkillsDesc: Extra-curricular participation fosters essential life skills that complement academic learning. Students develop teamwork, leadership, communication, time management, and problem-solving abilities—skills that prepare them not only for school success, but for life beyond. Whether collaborating on a group project or leading a charity initiative, students gain real-world experience that builds character and resilience.
Academics.extraBelongTitle: A Sense of Belonging and Well-being
Academics.extraBelongDesc: Being part of clubs, teams, and shared pursuits helps students forge friendships, strengthen social bonds, and feel more connected to their school community. This sense of belonging plays a crucial role in supporting mental health, emotional well-being, and overall student happiness.
Academics.extraGrowthDesc1: Universities and employers value more than just academic achievement. They look for well-rounded individuals who demonstrate initiative, commitment, and a diversity of experiences. Participation in extra-curricular activities enhances student profiles and helps them stand out during admissions and job applications.
Academics.extraGrowthDesc2: At Sankofa International School, we are proud to offer a dynamic and inclusive extra-curricular programme that supports each student’s personal growth, creativity, and ambition. We encourage all students to get involved, try something new, and discover their potential beyond the classroom.
Academics.tripsIntro1: At Sankofa International School, we believe that some of the most impactful learning happens beyond the classroom walls. Our school trips are thoughtfully designed to enrich the curriculum, inspire curiosity, and support the personal growth of every student.
Academics.tripsIntro2: From day visits to museums, galleries, and cultural sites to multi-day residential experiences both within Ethiopia and abroad, our trips provide students with opportunities to explore new environments, experience different cultures, and make real-world connections to their classroom learning.
Academics.tripsBringDesc: School trips help bring subjects to life by offering hands-on, immersive learning experiences. Whether it's a science excursion to explore natural ecosystems, a historical site visit for a deeper understanding of the past, or a language trip to practice communication in an authentic setting, these experiences make learning more engaging, meaningful, and memorable.
Academics.tripsGrowthDesc: Beyond academic enrichment, school trips play a vital role in developing key life skills. Students gain independence, confidence, resilience, and teamwork as they navigate new settings and take on new responsibilities. These experiences foster a sense of adventure, encourage problem-solving, and build stronger peer and teacher relationships in a relaxed and stimulating environment.
Academics.tripsMemoryDesc1: School trips are also about discovery, excitement, and joy. They offer a welcome break from the routine and provide students with the chance to try new activities, develop interests, and create shared memories that last a lifetime. These positive experiences contribute to overall well-being, motivation, and engagement in school life.
Academics.tripsMemoryDesc2: At Sankofa International School, we are committed to ensuring that our trips are inclusive, enriching, and accessible to all students. We see educational travel as a powerful tool for growth, learning, and personal development—and we strive to offer every student the opportunity to benefit from it.

policyParagraphs: At Sankofa International School, we are proud to offer a fair, inclusive, and transparent admissions process. Our approach is grounded in our core values of equity, respect, and diversity. Admission to the school is open to all applicants, regardless of academic background, nationality, ethnicity, religion, gender, or any other factor that could lead to discrimination.

We welcome families to visit the school prior to registration, giving prospective students and parents the opportunity to tour our facilities, meet staff, and experience the vibrant learning environment that defines Sankofa International School.

Re-enrolment for returning students is conducted annually. We are pleased to re-register students at the next level, provided there are no significant behavioural concerns that would warrant a review of enrolment status. Our commitment is to work closely with families to ensure the continued growth and success of every child.

Importantly, no student is denied admission based on medical conditions. We wholeheartedly welcome students with chronic health needs (including but not limited to diabetes, asthma, congenital heart conditions, epilepsy, or obesity) and are committed to providing the necessary support to ensure their well-being and academic progress.
Admissions.inclusiveAccessDesc: We invite applications from all students residing in Ethiopia who are seeking a high-quality international education within a globally minded learning community.
Admissions.corePrinciplesTitle: Our Admissions Policy Is Built on Three Core Principles
Admissions.prin1Desc: We uphold a strict non-discrimination policy. No student will be denied admission based on personal, academic, or socio-economic background.
Admissions.prin2Desc: We welcome and support students with learning difficulties and special educational needs (SEN). Our inclusive classrooms, coupled with tailored support strategies, aim to empower every student to achieve their fullest potential.
Admissions.policyOutro1: At Sankofa International School, we believe every child deserves the opportunity to learn, grow, and thrive in a safe and nurturing environment. We look forward to welcoming your family to our community.
Admissions.policyOutro2: If you have any questions or would like to schedule a visit, please contact our Admissions Office for more information.
Admissions.feesIntro:
Fees (2025–2026 Academic Year)
At Sankofa International School, we are committed to maintaining a transparent and fair approach to school fees. Our structure is designed to support high-quality teaching, learning resources, and continuous investment in our facilities.
Admissions.tuitionFeesIntro: For the 2025–26 academic year, annual tuition fees are as follows:
otherFeesDesc: When joining Sankofa International School, families should also be aware of additional fees. A $150 application fee is due at the time of submitting an application. This is refundable only if a place is not offered. Once an offer is accepted, a registration deposit of $300 is required to secure the student’s place; this deposit is non-refundable.

Each year, returning students pay a re-registration deposit of $250 to guarantee their place for the following academic year. In addition, the school charges a capital levy to support investment in our facilities. The amount depends on the year of enrolment, ranging from $500 to $1,800 for new students and $250 to $500 for students already enrolled before 2025–26.
paymentDesc: For returning students, the first term’s tuition must be settled at least two weeks before the start of term, and all registration and levy fees for the following year must be paid before the current school year ends. For new students, all required fees – including application, registration, capital levy, and the first term’s tuition – must be paid prior to the student’s first day at school.

In subsequent terms, tuition must always be paid two weeks before the start of term. Company-sponsored students are required to have the full year’s tuition settled in advance. International students pay in convertible currencies (USD, EUR or GBP), while Ethiopian students pay in Birr with a small portion in USD ($500–$750 depending on year of enrolment).
Admissions.discountDesc: Sankofa International School offers fee reductions to support families. A sibling discount applies to tuition fees: 5% for a second child, 10% for a third, and 15% for a fourth child. In addition, parents who pay the full annual tuition before the start of the school year receive an early payment discount of 5%. These discounts apply to tuition fees only.
Admissions.partYearDesc: Families joining mid-year will find our approach to fees proportionate. Students enrolling during the first half of a term are liable for the full tuition for that term, while those joining in the second half pay a pro-rated amount. The capital levy is also adjusted: full levy for Term 1 entrants, two-thirds for Term 2, and one-third for Term 3.
Admissions.refundsDesc: While registration and re-registration deposits are non-refundable, tuition refunds are possible under certain circumstances. If a student withdraws before the academic year begins, all tuition paid is refunded minus the deposit. For students already enrolled: up to two weeks’ attendance results in one month’s deduction, up to one month’s attendance results in two months’ deduction, and attendance beyond one month requires full payment of the term’s fees. Refunds are calculated from the official date of withdrawal request.
nonPaymentDesc: In the case of late or non-payment, Sankofa International School follows a clear policy. If fees remain unpaid six weeks after their due date, students may not attend classes or participate in school events until balances are cleared. Report cards, transfer certificates, and re-registration may also be withheld, although students are never prevented from sitting exams.

We recognise that unforeseen circumstances may create hardship, and families may formally request a payment plan through our finance office. Such requests are considered individually by the school board.
readinessIntro: At Sankofa International School, we recognise that not all children begin school with the same level of readiness. Research shows that areas such as speech and language development, social and emotional maturity, behaviour, and physical development can vary widely. These differences often stem from unmet developmental needs, limited access to early support, and increasing pressures on family life.

We define school readiness as the broad set of skills, knowledge, and attitudes that form the foundation for lifelong learning. A ready child is curious, eager to explore, emotionally resilient, and increasingly independent in their personal care. They are beginning to engage in social play, express themselves, and interact with others confidently.
Admissions.fourAreasTitle: We focus on four key areas of readiness:
Admissions.readinessParents: Parents play a vital role in nurturing these areas. At Sankofa International School, we support this development through our Early Years Foundation Stage (EYFS) curriculum, which promotes learning in a nurturing, play-based environment. This approach prepares children emotionally, socially, and academically for the transition into primary school.
Admissions.assessmentIntro: All children applying to our Early Years programme (Nursery, FS1, and FS2) are welcomed without formal entrance tests. However, a gentle school readiness assessment is conducted by qualified academic staff, in collaboration with our Learning Support Team. This assessment:
assessmentList: Observes interaction with peers and adults
Assesses English language proficiency (for EAL learners)
Admissions.assessmentOutro: The purpose is to better understand each child’s individual needs—not to determine admission eligibility, but to tailor our support from day one.
Admissions.senTitle: Admission of Students with Special Educational Needs (SEN)
Admissions.senIntro: At Sankofa, we are proud to offer an inclusive learning environment where all students, including those with mild to moderate special educational needs, are supported to thrive. We provide:
senList: A welcoming and supportive school culture
Ongoing collaboration with families and specialists
Admissions.senOutro: Where a child may require additional support, we may request a tailored readiness assessment to help us prepare the right interventions. In cases where we are unable to meet a child’s needs adequately, we will communicate this transparently and compassionately, always prioritising the child’s best interests.
tourDesc: Choosing the right school is one of the most important decisions a family can make—and we believe that seeing is believing. We warmly invite prospective parents and students to visit our campus and experience the vibrant, welcoming atmosphere that defines life at Sankofa International School.

Whether you're considering enrolment or simply exploring your options, we would be delighted to show you around and help you discover what makes Sankofa International School a truly unique learning environment.
Admissions.scheduleDesc: Booking a tour is easy. Simply contact our Admissions Office using the details below:
Admissions.tourAvailability: Tours are available Monday to Friday between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM. Weekend visits may be arranged on request.
Admissions.tourOutro: We look forward to welcoming you to Sankofa International School and helping you take the next step in your child’s educational journey.
Admissions.applyIntro: We are delighted that you’re considering Sankofa International School for your child’s education. Our admissions process is simple, transparent, and designed to help families feel supported every step of the way.

applySteps.title: Complete the Online Application Form:
applySteps.desc: Please fill out the form accurately with all required information.

applySteps.title: Submit Required Documents:
applySteps.desc: Upload academic records, birth certificate, passport copy (or ID), and any relevant reports (e.g., medical or learning support needs).

applySteps.title: Await Confirmation:
applySteps.desc: Once submitted, our Admissions Team will contact you to confirm receipt and guide you through the next steps.

Admissions.applyOutro: We look forward to welcoming you to the Sankofa International School family!
Admissions.finAidIntro: At Sankofa International School, we are committed to making quality education accessible and rewarding excellence, potential, and dedication. To support this vision, we offer a range of financial assistance options for eligible students and staff.
Admissions.scholDesc: Scholarships are awarded to Ethiopian students who demonstrate outstanding merit, whether through academic excellence, exceptional talent, or athletic achievement. These awards are highly competitive and are designed to recognise and nurture excellence. Scholarship recipients may receive partial or full support toward tuition fees, textbooks, and other educational costs.
Admissions.bursaryDesc: Bursaries are financial support awards based on demonstrated financial need. At Sankofa International School, bursaries are available to Ethiopian students whose families may face financial barriers to accessing quality education. These awards do not require repayment and cover tuition fees in full or in part. All bursaries are means-tested, ensuring support reaches those most in need.
Admissions.waiverDesc: Sankofa International School also provides fee waivers for a select group of staff members as part of our commitment to supporting our dedicated team. These waivers are granted based on predefined eligibility criteria and are designed to assist employees with the education of their own children.

Portal.title: Student Portal
Portal.note: Contact the IT Helpdesk if you have misplaced or forgotten your access key.
Portal.uplinkSuccessDesc: Your physical file has been cataloged and routed to the department supervisor.

Calendar.title: Academic Calendar.
Calendar.sub: Track session dates, examinations, administrative milestones, and community holidays for the 2026/2027 academic year.

Stream.pageDesc: Experience Sankofa International School from anywhere in the world. Watch our latest events, campus tours, academic lectures, and student highlights directly from our official broadcasting channel.
Stream.ctaDesc: Never miss an update. Subscribe to our official YouTube channel to get notified instantly when we upload new campus tours, student achievements, and academic documentaries.

Footer.schoolDesc: Committed to providing an uncompromising international academic standard, deeply rooted in the moral core of our Ethiopian heritage.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Elroi Technology Service PLC. All Rights Reserved.

Careers.pageDesc: At Sankofa International School, we are always looking for passionate, world-class educators and staff who are committed to nurturing the next generation of global leaders.
Careers.val1Desc: Be part of a deeply respected institution that values Ethiopian heritage while pushing the boundaries of international education.
Careers.val2Desc: We invest heavily in our staff, offering continuous Pearson Edexcel training, leadership pathways, and global networking opportunities.
Careers.val3Desc: Teach in an environment equipped with state-of-the-art STEM labs, interactive classrooms, and expansive creative arts studios.

Announcements.pageDesc: Stay updated with the latest press releases, academic achievements, and community announcements from Sankofa International School.
Announcements.featuredTitle: Sankofa International School Secures CIS Candidate Status.
Announcements.featuredDesc: We are immensely proud to announce that our institution has officially been granted Candidate Status by the Council of International Schools, marking a massive milestone in our commitment to global educational excellence.

newsList.title: Annual Science Fair Winners Announced
newsList.desc: Congratulations to our Year 11 students for their award-winning sustainable energy project.

newsList.title: New Olympic Sports Complex Opens
newsList.desc: Our brand new athletic facility is now officially open to all primary and secondary students.

newsList.title: Parent-Teacher Conferences Schedule
newsList.desc: Please review the updated academic schedule for the upcoming Spring Term evaluations.

Contact.pageDesc: Whether you are a prospective parent, a community partner, or a career applicant, we would love to hear from you.
Contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. Our admissions team will respond to your inquiry shortly.
